Check out our social media

  • The Silver Arrows are BACK… again 🏹   @iron.lynx returns to Le Mans, continuing the Mercedes-AMG Silver Arrows concept first brought back in 2025, now evolved with three fresh 2026 liveries.   Revealed together with @lemansultimate, the designs are s...
  • Shapes uniquely formed by the pursuit of victory.   Designed to conquer the World Endurance Championship.   #WEC
  • 🚨 BREAKING NEWS: @louisdeletraz to replace Alex Lynn and drive the #12 Cadillac at the 2026 24 Hours of Le Mans.   Statement from Sam Hignett, Director & Co-Founder of Cadillac Hertz Team JOTA:   “We’re pleased to have Louis stepping into the car for...
  • 🚨BREAKING NEWS: @alexlynnracing will not compete at Le Mans next month.  Cadillac Hertz Team JOTA has confirmed that #12 driver Alex Lynn will miss the 2026 24 Hours of Le Mans due to the postponement of a planned medical procedure.   Team statement:...
  • One week ago, the fans brought Spa to life 🫶 From the grandstands to the paddock, nothing compares to sharing race day with so many of you around @circuit_spa_francorchamps!   #WEC #6HSpa
  • #87 goes green for Le Mans 💚   @akkodisaspteam unveils a bold green, grey, and silver livery ahead of the 24 Hours of Le Mans, with @rpumb, @clemensschmid, and @pechito37 behind the wheel 💪   #WEC #LeMans24 #Lexus
  • Old school cars at an old school circuit 👌   The Legends of Le Mans support series brought a stunning slice of racing history to Spa... and the noise to go with it!   #WEC #6HSpa
  • When one angle of Raidillon isn’t enough 😮‍💨    WEC + Spa-Francorchamps is unmatched!   #WEC #6HSpa
  • Your new Hypercar LEADERS: @bmwmmotorsport 🙌 It took three years and a lot of determination to achieve a maiden Hypercar win last weekend, but BMW’s sensational 1-2 finish at Spa has also secured the brand a top spot in the Manufacturers’ Standings a...
  • #78 @akkodisaspteam Le Mans colours revealed ⚡️   The Lexus RC F LMGT3 takes on the 24 Hours of Le Mans in a special livery inspired by Akkodis branding, with @tom_van_rompuy, @hadriendavidofficial, and @jackhawkrace set for the challenge 💪   #WEC #L...
